core_mechanism: A two-stage sequence-labelling pipeline: a bank of learned shift-invariant local convolution filters that map each segment of a raw 1-D signal into a feature vector, feeding a bidirectional gated-recurrent memory (LSTM) that learns the transition dependencies between successive elements of an ordered sequence.
brief_reason: The abstract states that convolutional networks extract time-invariant features from the raw single-channel signal while a bidirectional-LSTM automatically learns transition rules among successive epochs, i.e. shift-invariant local filtering followed by a bidirectional recurrent model of ordered-sequence state transitions.
